member.name: T:Skua.Core.Compiler
member.summary: "Slightly" modified compiler based on Westwind.Scripting (https://github.com/RickStrahl/Westwind.Scripting)

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Compiler.CompileClass(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},Skua.Core.ScriptLoadContext,System.String)
member.summary:
This method compiles a class and hands back a dynamic reference to that class that you can call members on.
Must have include parameterless ctor()
member.param: Fully self-contained C# class
Optional hash for disk cache lookup
Optional AssemblyLoadContext for loading the assembly
Optional script name for cache file naming
member.returns: Instance of that class or null

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Compiler.CompileClassToType(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},Skua.Core.ScriptLoadContext,System.String)
member.summary: This method compiles a class and hands back a dynamic reference to that class that you can call members on.
member.param: Fully self-contained C# class
Optional hash for disk cache lookup
Optional AssemblyLoadContext for loading the assembly
Optional script name for cache file naming
member.returns: Instance of that class or null

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Compiler.CompileAssembly(System.String,System.Boolean)

summary.para: Compiles a class and creates an assembly from the compiled class.
Assembly is stored on the `.Assembly` property. Use `noLoad()` to bypass loading of the assembly

member.param: Source code
if set doesn't load the assembly (useful only when OutputAssembly is set)

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Compiler.ClearAssemblyCache
member.summary: Clears the cached assemblies to free memory
